posts.text:
The protests and organizing don’t end today- this is the opening salvo to the fight that is being built not just against Musk/Trump but to take back our govt and make sure it fights for working families #HandsOff


MS NOW Reports (@MSNOW_Reports)

NextGen America President @cristinanextgen and Former Advisor to Speaker John Boehner (R-OH) & former Rep. Adam Kinzinger (R-IL), Maura Gillespie, join @EenaRuffini to weigh in on the politics of these marches.

msnbc.com/weekends-with-alex…




—

Stock market falling, inflation is up, tariffs about to rise the cost on Americans - looks like Elon and Trump are building an economy for the top 1% #SOTU

Video
For the record - a sitting president defying court orders? That’s not democracy. That’s a constitutional crisis in the making.

Tell Congress: Vote NO on the SAVE Act & Protect Voting Rights

nextgenamerica.org/act/save-…

Congress is days away from passing a law that could strip millions of Americans of their right to vote. 

They call it the "SAVE" Act, but it's really the STRIP AWAY YOUR RIGHTS Act.

Stay focused: Trump is purging the CISA, the agency protecting U.S. elections from cyberattacks and foreign interference. 

Trump isn’t just weakening election security—he’s making it easier for bad actors to manipulate our democracy.

"America First"? More like Billionaires First. 

Trump’s entire presidency is a handout to the ultra-rich.

Every agency meant to help working families is being hollowed out under Trump. Because helping people isn’t his priority—helping billionaires is.

Your child’s education, your healthcare, your safety net—Trump is dismantling it all while billionaires cash in.

Trump’s administration is the richest in modern history, packed with 13 billionaires. No wonder working families are struggling while the wealthy thrive.

Trump and Elon are handing corporations EVERYTHING while workers get crumbs.

Trump’s billionaire cabinet is looting the federal government to cover tax cuts for the ultra-rich. 

He isn’t "draining the swamp"—he’s filling it with billionaires and using YOUR tax dollars to make them richer.

Trump says he’s “fighting for the American worker.” 

Let me be clear - his policies would cripple U.S. agriculture, construction, and food industries.

Tell Congress: Vote NO on the SAVE Act & Protect Voting Rights

nextgenamerica.org/act/save-…

The SAVE Act is the GOP’s latest attempt to curtail voting rights. 

Under the guise of "election security," this legislation would impose harsh restrictions that could prevent millions of young voters, naturalized citizens, and voters of color — from casting their ballots.

Dismantling the CFPB lets financial predators run wild and makes the middle class pay the price. 

It’s yet another part of the Republican Rip Off: stealing hard-earned money from the American people to reward billionaire donors and big corporations.

When we join together, the many can take on the money. We can’t give them an inch. Today, tomorrow, and every day we are here and ready to stop their Project 2025 agenda and protect our freedoms, our families, and our futures.

MAGA and the billionaires who installed them remain determined to seize more power, at any cost to everyday Americans, and will attempt to divide and distract us - pitting people and programs against each other - so they can seize our funds to line their pockets.

Why does Trump attack immigrants, trans people, and civil servants while dismantling government agencies? 

Because he wants total control.
Who else feels like every day is a new crisis with Trump? That’s the point. Stay vigilant.

Fun fact: 95% of avocados for the Super Bowl come from Mexico. 

Trump wants to slap a 25% tax on them.
